environmentVariables.name: TILA_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: API token for authenticating with the tila server

environmentVariables.name: TILA_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the tila worker (e.g. https://tila.example.workers.dev)

environmentVariables.name: TILA_PROJECT_ID
environmentVariables.description: tila project ID to scope all operations
